title: codiaeum variegatum var. moluccanum
intro: Codiaeum variegatum var. moluccanum, also known as the Croton plant, is a variety of the Codiaeum variegatum plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The leaves of the Croton plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with consuming Croton plant preparations include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of the Croton plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
